items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 12 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (about 130-145 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes. Perform 5x800m intervals at 5:10 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on lower body strength: 3 sets of 10-12 reps of squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Include core exercises like planks (3 sets of 30 seconds).

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 130 bpm.
